message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[]","[]","1"],"focus":"Both lists empty -> should return 'No data provided' (empty-list check precedes window-size validation)."},{"input_lines":["[1, -1, 3]","[10, 10, 10]","3"],"focus":"Single full window where power max == min -> should trigger 'Division by zero detected'."},{"input_lines":["[0, 2.5, 5]","[10, 11, 12]","2"],"focus":"Non-integer temperature reading (float) -> should return 'Unprocessable readings' after type/value validation."}]}
